underlying_goal: Fix npm package version discrepancy (1.13 vs 1.16), automate version stamping in release process, and begin namespace differentiation work for co-installation with upstream GSD
friction_detail: Global install wiped the worktree directory causing a zombie session; initial install didn't include +dev suffix; merge conflicts required manual resolution.
brief_summary: User needed to fix a stale version in npm package template and add auto-stamping, plus begin namespace work for co-installation — version fixes were merged but namespace work remains open, and the session ended in a zombie worktree state.
